headline: Is Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) Now Fairly Priced After This Year’s 25% Share Price Slide?
summary: If you are wondering whether Intuitive Surgical at around US$418.82 is starting to look attractively priced or still expensive, it helps to break the story into what the stock has done recently and how that lines up with its fundamentals. The share price is down 1.1% over the past week, 7.2% over the past month, and 25.5% year to date, although it is still up 34.7% over three years and 46.2% over five years. These mixed returns sit against an ongoing stream of interest in robotic assisted...
